texto: Although I have always rejected this fear of the other, and the racism that it inevitably fuels, I have learned from experience that it is a deeply rooted need in the human psyche. at the slightest provocation we will put distance between ourselves and those we cannot or do not want to understand
explicacao: Citação de Susan Nathan sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Although I have always rejected this fear of the other, and the racism that it inevitably fuels, …” articula sabedoria, human-psyche, racism em registro de sabedoria, com relevância para contextos como racism.
